validation_queries.description: Check that we have some string entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string
validation_queries.error_message: No string entries found in rocpd_string table

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%ompt%'
validation_queries.error_message: No OMPT-related strings found in rocpd_string table

validation_queries.description: Check that 'openmp::' appears more than 10 times in string column
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%openmp::%';
validation_queries.error_message: 'openmp::' appears fewer than 11 times in string column of rocpd_string

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM top WHERE name IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with null function names in top table

validation_queries.description: Check for OpenMP functions present more than 20 times
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM top WHERE name LIKE '%omp%' AND total_calls > 20
validation_queries.error_message: No OpenMP functions found with more than 20 calls in top table

validation_queries.description: Check that all entries have valid duration
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM top WHERE total_duration <= 0
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with zero or negative duration in top table

validation_queries.description: Check that 'openmp' appears more than 1000 times in the name column
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM regions WHERE name LIKE '%openmp%'
validation_queries.error_message: 'openmp' appears fewer than 1001 times in the name column of regions table

validation_queries.description: Check that id is not null in regions table
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM regions WHERE id IS NULL
validation_queries.error_message: Found entries with null id in regions table
